class.name: FestivalItem
class.brief_description: An inventory item that can be held or visibly presented.
class.description: Items are part of the perception equation both while simply held and when presented (visibly shown) to an NPC. Per-run inventory lives in [FestivalWorld]; this resource only describes the item.

members.member: Unique identifier used by inventory and interaction gates.
If [code]true[/code], the item can be visibly presented to influence perception.
If [code]true[/code], multiple copies stack into a single inventory count.
